title: ITMS
texts: Lx Hausys brings years of expertise in manufacturing top quality products for the Sign & Graphics Industry. LX Hausys reliable products and friendly & dedicated service will help advance your business, while giving you peace of mind.
Total Integrated Solution In-House from PVC to Calendering to Coating
Cost Advantage from Lean Distribution Channel and India-S.Korea Partnership
ITMS (Infinity Trade & Marketing Solutions) Has started operations in 2010 with head office in Delhi and currently has a pan India presence through its own branches and appointed dealers.
ITMS India Pvt. Ltd., ITMS Powertech Pvt. Ltd.,
1002, 10th Floor, Block-C, NDM-2, Netaji Subhash Place, Wazirpur District Centre, Delhi-110034, INDIA
